title: Open Range
writer: Roy Briant, Zane Grey, J. Walter Ruben
actors: Betty Bronson, Lane Chandler, Fred Kohler
plot: Hired ranch-hand Tex Smith is smitten with Lucy Blake, who lives in the cattle settlement of Marco. Meanwhile, Indian chief Brave Bear despises the encroachment of white people and conspires with Sam Hardman to steal the town's ca...
